title: Peristylus biermannianus
taxonomy: Peristylus biermannianus is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This genus, Peristylus, is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Peristylus biermannianus is further classified under the tribe Orchideae. The classification of Peristylus biermannianus is also often expressed in a hierarchical manner: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, genus Peristylus, species P. biermannianus. This precise classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships among various plant species.
